title: rubus mesogaeus var. glabrescens
intro: Rubus mesogaeus var. glabrescens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It is a type of bramble with edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain diseases, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus mesogaeus var. glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
